zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Cogan of Bampton於1189年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Richard de Cogan25歲，母親Basilie de Riddlesford-14歲。他於大約1240年與Mary or Margery Prendergast結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1278年在英國戴文迪維頓享年89歲，埋葬在英國戴文巴普頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cogan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Jewish (from Ukraine) Kogan, from the Russian pronunciation of Cohen .

Irish and Welsh (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cogan near Cardiff, which may have been named with a Welsh word meaning ‘bowl, depression’. In 1166 Milo de Cogan, held two fees near Penarth (Glamorganshire) of William earl of Gloucester. Members of this Norman family probably account for the name's appearance in 13th-century Berwickshire. By this time the family was also present in Ireland, associated with counties Limerick and Cork. It may have been the Irish branch that later brought the name to southwest Scotland.

variants.name: Cogen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Dorith.  German Erwin.

variants.name: Cohen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Isadore, Emanuel, Moshe, Shlomo, Myer, Avi, Yehuda, Chaim.
Jewish: from Hebrew kohen ‘priest’. Priests are traditionally regarded as members of a hereditary caste descended from Aaron, brother of Moses. See also Kaplan .
Irish (Galway and Sligo): variant of   Coyne  .

variants.name: Coggins
meanings: English: variant of Cogan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Coggan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Conal, Seamus.  Jewish Hyman.
Americanized form of Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Kogan, from the Russian pronunciation of Cohen .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Cogan of Bampton was born in 1189, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Richard de Cogan, was 25 and his mother, Basilie de Riddlesford, was -14. He married Mary or Margery Prendergast about 1240. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1278, in Tiverton, Devon, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Bampton, Devon, England.

fr.Cogan, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom: Cogan, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Cogan of Bampton est né en 1189, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Richard de Cogan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Basilie de Riddlesford, avait -14 ans. Il a épousé Mary or Margery Prendergast environ 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1278, à Tiverton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Cogan of Bampton 1189 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Cogan 25 und seine Mutter Basilie de Riddlesford -14. Er hat um 1240 Mary or Margery Prendergast geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1278 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Tiverton, Devon, England und wurde in Bampton, Devon, England begraben.

Lui sposato Mary or Margery Prendergast circa 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Cogan of Bampton(이)가 1189년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Cogan(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Basilie de Riddlesford(은)는 -14세였다. 그는 대략 1240년 Mary or Margery Prendergast(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1278년 영국 데폰 티버턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 바프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Cogan of Bampton nasceu em 1189, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Richard de Cogan, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Basilie de Riddlesford, tinha -14 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary or Margery Prendergast aproximadamente 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1278, em Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Cogan of Bampton родился в 1189 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Richard de Cogan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilie de Riddlesford, -14. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary or Margery Prendergast около 1240 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1278 г. в местности тивиртон, девон, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности бамптон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Cogan of Bampton nació en 1189, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Richard de Cogan, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Basilie de Riddlesford, tenía -14 años. Se casó con Mary or Margery Prendergast aproximadamente 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1278, en Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra.
